result.stdout:
Description:
  Package Avalonia apps for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Includes app signing and deployment of ready-to-install binaries to simplify distribution.

Usage:
  parcel [command] [options]

Options:
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --version                                                                Show version information

Commands:
  pack <project>  Builds and packs project according to the pre-defined settings and input parameters.
  step            Runs a specific step from the packaging process. Useful for debugging or customized packaging flow.
  install-tools   Downloads or updates tool dependencies necessary for the packaging configuration.
  mcp             Runs Model Context Protocol server, allowing to run Parcel commands from the LLM AI session.

Commands:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Downloads or updates tool dependencies necessary for the packaging configuration.

Usage:
  parcel install-tools [options]

Options:
  -r, --runtimes <runtimes>                                                Runtimes identifiers to pack application with. Can be multiple.
  -p, --packages <packages>                                                Package formats to output. Can be multiple.
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]

result.stdout:
Description:
  Builds and packs project according to the pre-defined settings and input parameters.

Usage:
  parcel pack <project> [options]

Arguments:
  <project>  Parcel project file to load config from.

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                                                    Output directory. [default: <project-dir>/bin/packages]
  -r, --runtimes <runtimes>                                                Runtimes identifiers to pack application with. Can be multiple. [default: linux-x64]
  -p, --packages <deb|dmg|nsis|zip>                                        Package formats to output. Can be multiple. [default: deb]
  --no-build                                                               When set, Parcel will not recompile input project. Note, publish related settings (trimming, aot, single-file) must be identical between your build and parcel configuration.
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]

commands.payload:
Description:
  Builds and packs project according to the pre-defined settings and input parameters.

Usage:
  parcel pack <project> [options]

Arguments:
  <project>  Parcel project file to load config from.

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                                                    Output directory. [default: <project-dir>/bin/packages]
  -r, --runtimes <runtimes>                                                Runtimes identifiers to pack application with. Can be multiple. [default: linux-x64]
  -p, --packages <deb|dmg|nsis|zip>                                        Package formats to output. Can be multiple. [default: deb]
  --no-build                                                               When set, Parcel will not recompile input project. Note, publish related settings (trimming, aot, single-file) must be identical between your build and parcel configuration.
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]

result.stdout:
Description:
  Runs a specific step from the packaging process. Useful for debugging or customized packaging flow.

Usage:
  parcel step [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]

Commands:
  publish <output>              Publishes .NET project for the target platform and runtime identifier. Publish options are defined in project settings, runtime identifier information is specified by the console arguments.
  merge-mac <input> <output>    Merges multiple architecture builds into a universal macOS app bundle.
  bundle-mac <input> <output>   Packages the macOS app and its dependencies into a single bundle.
  sign-mac <input> <output>     Signs macOS app bundle and components using credentials from project settings.
  notary-mac <input> <output>   Submits app for Apple notarization and staples ticket if accepted. Credentials are taken from project settings.
  sign-win <input> <output>     Signs Windows application executable using selected signing provider from project settings.
  create-zip <input> <output>   Creates a zip archive for distribution, preserving file permissions and symbolic links.
  create-dmg <input> <output>   Creates a DMG disk image for macOS distribution. Visual customization is defined in the project settings.
  create-deb <input> <output>   Creates a Debian package (.deb) for Linux. Uses metadata and desktop integration from project settings.
  create-rpm <input> <output>   Creates a Fedora package (.rpm) for Linux. Uses metadata and desktop integration from project settings.
  create-nsis <input> <output>  Creates a Windows NSIS installer executable. Installer options are defined in project settings.

commands.payload:

  publish <output>              Publishes .NET project for the target platform and runtime identifier. Publish options are defined in project settings, runtime identifier information is specified by the console arguments.
  merge-mac <input> <output>    Merges multiple architecture builds into a universal macOS app bundle.
  bundle-mac <input> <output>   Packages the macOS app and its dependencies into a single bundle.
  sign-mac <input> <output>     Signs macOS app bundle and components using credentials from project settings.
  notary-mac <input> <output>   Submits app for Apple notarization and staples ticket if accepted. Credentials are taken from project settings.
  sign-win <input> <output>     Signs Windows application executable using selected signing provider from project settings.
  create-zip <input> <output>   Creates a zip archive for distribution, preserving file permissions and symbolic links.
  create-dmg <input> <output>   Creates a DMG disk image for macOS distribution. Visual customization is defined in the project settings.
  create-deb <input> <output>   Creates a Debian package (.deb) for Linux. Uses metadata and desktop integration from project settings.
  create-rpm <input> <output>   Creates a Fedora package (.rpm) for Linux. Uses metadata and desktop integration from project settings.
  create-nsis <input> <output>  Creates a Windows NSIS installer executable. Installer options are defined in project settings.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Packages the macOS app and its dependencies into a single bundle.

Usage:
  parcel step bundle-mac <input> <output> [options]

Arguments:
  <input>   Directory containing the macOS app with executable matching project's AssemblyName.
  <output>  Bundle directory output (.app).

Options:
  -p, --project <project>                                                  Parcel project file to load config from.
  -w, --overwrite                                                          When set, existing output files will be overwritten.
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]

result.stdout:
Description:
  Merges multiple architecture builds into a universal macOS app bundle.

Usage:
  parcel step merge-mac <input> <output> [options]

Arguments:
  <input>   Directory with architecture-specific subdirectories (e.g., osx-x64, osx-arm64) to merge together.
  <output>  Universal app directory written to the output location.

Options:
  -p, --project <project>                                                  Parcel project file to load config from.
  -w, --overwrite                                                          When set, existing output files will be overwritten.
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]

Description:
  Publishes .NET project for the target platform and runtime identifier. Publish options are defined in project settings, runtime identifier information is specified by the console arguments.

Usage:
  parcel step publish <output> [options]

Arguments:
  <output>  Published application directory output.

Options:
  -p, --project <project>                                                  Parcel project file to load config from.
  -w, --overwrite                                                          When set, existing output files will be overwritten.
  -r, --runtime <runtime>                                                  Runtimes identifier to run parcel step.
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]

  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]

commands.payload:
Description:
  Signs Windows application executable using selected signing provider from project settings.

Usage:
  parcel step sign-win <input> <output> [options]

Arguments:
  <input>   Application directory with executable matching project's AssemblyName.
  <output>  Signed executable output.

Options:
  -p, --project <project>                                                  Parcel project file to load config from.
  -w, --overwrite                                                          When set, existing output files will be overwritten.
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --license-key <license-key>                                              License key necessary to run Parcel. If unset, falls back to the "ACCELERATE_LICENSE_KEY" env variable, or existing app session.
  -v, --verbosity <d|detailed|diag|diagnostic|m|minimal|n|normal|q|quiet>  Set the verbosity level [default: Normal]
